refactor(magazine): FIX 8+9 — typed supabase.from() + cobertura de testes magazine-guard (#1708)

* fix(magazine): wire validateBranding into setBranding, fix 3 test fixtures

- GAP 1: validateBranding() was never called by setBranding() in
  useMagazineEditor — branding data reached persistence unsanitized.
  Now setBranding() validates/sanitizes colors via the guard before
  persisting, closing the XSS vector through color fields.

- GAP 2: partial colors objects (e.g. only primary provided) silently
  dropped required keys. validateBranding() now defaults missing keys
  to #000000 instead of producing an incomplete object.

- GAP 3: 3 test fixtures (PreviewSidebar.empty, DesignStep, EditorHero)
  were missing viewCount and archivedAt fields added by FIX 3.

- Stale comment: magazineService.ts header said types regen was pending
  but FIX 6 already regenerated them.

* fix(magazine): move useMagazinePublish hook ABOVE early returns — React #310

ROOT CAUSE:
`useMagazinePublish` (which calls useState + useCallback internally)
was positioned AFTER the two early returns (`!editor.loaded` / `!magazine`).

Render 1 (loaded=false) → early return → N hooks executed
Render 2 (loaded=true) → passes early returns → N+1 hooks → React #310 crash

FIX:
- Move `publishable` computation before early returns, with null guard
- Move `useMagazinePublish(...)` hook call before early returns
- Move `goToStep` into a useCallback (was plain function after returns)
- All hooks now run unconditionally at the top of the component
- Early returns remain below ALL hooks

This is the same class of bug fixed previously for useMemo (documented
in the long comment block), but the Lovable bot re-introduced it by
adding useMagazinePublish after the guard zone.

Crash confirmed in production: promogifts.com.br 2026-07-16T13:52:49Z

* fix(magazine): move useMagazinePublish hook ABOVE early returns — React #310

ROOT CAUSE:
`useMagazinePublish` (which calls useState + useCallback internally)
was positioned AFTER the two early returns (`!editor.loaded` / `!magazine`).

Render 1 (loaded=false) → early return → N hooks executed
Render 2 (loaded=true) → passes early returns → N+1 hooks → React #310 crash

FIX:
- Move `publishable` computation before early returns, with null guard
- Move `useMagazinePublish(...)` hook call before early returns
- Move `goToStep` into a useCallback (was plain function after returns)
- All hooks now run unconditionally at the top of the component
- Early returns remain below ALL hooks

This is the same class of bug fixed previously for useMemo (documented
in the long comment block), but the Lovable bot re-introduced it by
adding useMagazinePublish after the guard zone.

* fix(magazine): move useMagazinePublish hook ABOVE early returns — React #310

ROOT CAUSE:
`useMagazinePublish` (which calls useState + useCallback internally)
was positioned AFTER the two early returns (`!editor.loaded` / `!magazine`).

Render 1 (loaded=false) → early return → N hooks executed
Render 2 (loaded=true) → passes early returns → N+1 hooks → React #310 crash

FIX:
- Move `publishable` computation before early returns, with null guard
- Move `useMagazinePublish(...)` hook call before early returns
- Move `goToStep` into a useCallback (was plain function after returns)
- All hooks now run unconditionally at the top of the component
- Early returns remain below ALL hooks

This is the same class of bug fixed previously for useMemo (documented
in the long comment block), but the Lovable bot re-introduced it by
adding useMagazinePublish after the guard zone.

* fix(magazine): move useMagazinePublish hook ABOVE early returns — React #310

ROOT CAUSE:
`useMagazinePublish` (which calls useState + useCallback internally)
was positioned AFTER the two early returns (`!editor.loaded` / `!magazine`).

Render 1 (loaded=false) → early return → N hooks executed
Render 2 (loaded=true) → passes early returns → N+1 hooks → React #310 crash

FIX:
- Move `publishable` computation before early returns, with null guard
- Move `useMagazinePublish(...)` hook call before early returns
- Move `goToStep` into a useCallback (was plain function after returns)
- All hooks now run unconditionally at the top of the component
- Early returns remain below ALL hooks

This is the same class of bug fixed previously for useMemo (documented
in the long comment block), but the Lovable bot re-introduced it by
adding useMagazinePublish after the guard zone.

* fix(magazine): move useMagazinePublish hook ABOVE early returns — React #310

ROOT CAUSE:
`useMagazinePublish` (which calls useState + useCallback internally)
was positioned AFTER the two early returns (`!editor.loaded` / `!magazine`).

Render 1 (loaded=false) → early return → N hooks executed
Render 2 (loaded=true) → passes early returns → N+1 hooks → React #310 crash

FIX:
- Move `publishable` computation before early returns, with null guard
- Move `useMagazinePublish(...)` hook call before early returns
- Move `goToStep` into a useCallback (was plain function after returns)
- All hooks now run unconditionally at the top of the component
- Early returns remain below ALL hooks

This is the same class of bug fixed previously for useMemo (documented
in the long comment block), but the Lovable bot re-introduced it by
adding useMagazinePublish after the guard zone.

* fix(magazine): move useMagazinePublish hook ABOVE early returns — React #310

ROOT CAUSE:
`useMagazinePublish` (which calls useState + useCallback internally)
was positioned AFTER the two early returns (`!editor.loaded` / `!magazine`).

Render 1 (loaded=false) → early return → N hooks executed
Render 2 (loaded=true) → passes early returns → N+1 hooks → React #310 crash

FIX:
- Move `publishable` computation before early returns, with null guard
- Move `useMagazinePublish(...)` hook call before early returns
- Move `goToStep` into a useCallback (was plain function after returns)
- All hooks now run unconditionally at the top of the component
- Early returns remain below ALL hooks

This is the same class of bug fixed previously for useMemo (documented
in the long comment block), but the Lovable bot re-introduced it by
adding useMagazinePublish after the guard zone.

* fix(magazine): move useMagazinePublish hook ABOVE early returns — React #310

ROOT CAUSE:
`useMagazinePublish` (which calls useState + useCallback internally)
was positioned AFTER the two early returns (`!editor.loaded` / `!magazine`).

Render 1 (loaded=false) → early return → N hooks executed
Render 2 (loaded=true) → passes early returns → N+1 hooks → React #310 crash

FIX:
- Move `publishable` computation before early returns, with null guard
- Move `useMagazinePublish(...)` hook call before early returns
- Move `goToStep` into a useCallback (was plain function after returns)
- All hooks now run unconditionally at the top of the component
- Early returns remain below ALL hooks

This is the same class of bug fixed previously for useMemo (documented
in the long comment block), but the Lovable bot re-introduced it by
adding useMagazinePublish after the guard zone.

* fix(magazine): move useMagazinePublish hook ABOVE early returns — React #310

ROOT CAUSE:
`useMagazinePublish` (which calls useState + useCallback internally)
was positioned AFTER the two early returns (`!editor.loaded` / `!magazine`).

Render 1 (loaded=false) → early return → N hooks executed
Render 2 (loaded=true) → passes early returns → N+1 hooks → React #310 crash

FIX:
- Move `publishable` computation before early returns, with null guard
- Move `useMagazinePublish(...)` hook call before early returns
- Move `goToStep` into a useCallback (was plain function after returns)
- All hooks now run unconditionally at the top of the component
- Early returns remain below ALL hooks

This is the same class of bug fixed previously for useMemo (documented
in the long comment block), but the Lovable bot re-introduced it by
adding useMagazinePublish after the guard zone.

* fix(magazine): move useMagazinePublish hook ABOVE early returns — React #310

ROOT CAUSE:
`useMagazinePublish` (which calls useState + useCallback internally)
was positioned AFTER the two early returns (`!editor.loaded` / `!magazine`).

Render 1 (loaded=false) → early return → N hooks executed
Render 2 (loaded=true) → passes early returns → N+1 hooks → React #310 crash

FIX:
- Move `publishable` computation before early returns, with null guard
- Move `useMagazinePublish(...)` hook call before early returns
- Move `goToStep` into a useCallback (was plain function after returns)
- All hooks now run unconditionally at the top of the component
- Early returns remain below ALL hooks

This is the same class of bug fixed previously for useMemo (documented
in the long comment block), but the Lovable bot re-introduced it by
adding useMagazinePublish after the guard zone.

* fix(magazine): move useMagazinePublish hook ABOVE early returns — React #310

ROOT CAUSE:
`useMagazinePublish` (which calls useState + useCallback internally)
was positioned AFTER the two early returns (`!editor.loaded` / `!magazine`).

Render 1 (loaded=false) → early return → N hooks executed
Render 2 (loaded=true) → passes early returns → N+1 hooks → React #310 crash

- Move `publishable` computation before early returns, with null guard
- Move `useMagazinePublish(...)` hook call before early returns
- Move `goToStep` into a useCallback (was plain function after returns)
- All hooks now run unconditionally at the top of the component
- Early returns remain below ALL hooks

This is the same class of bug fixed previously for useMemo (documented
in the long comment block), but the Lovable bot re-introduced it by
adding useMagazinePublish after the guard zone.

* fix(magazine): move useMagazinePublish hook ABOVE early returns — React #310

ROOT CAUSE:
`useMagazinePublish` (which calls useState + useCallback internally)
was positioned AFTER the two early returns (`!editor.loaded` / `!magazine`).

Render 1 (loaded=false) → early return → N hooks executed
Render 2 (loaded=true) → passes early returns → N+1 hooks → React #310 crash

FIX:
- Move `publishable` computation before early returns, with null guard
- Move `useMagazinePublish(...)` hook call before early returns
- Move `goToStep` into a useCallback (was plain function after returns)
- All hooks now run unconditionally at the top of the component
- Early returns remain below ALL hooks

This is the same class of bug fixed previously for useMemo (documented
in the long comment block), but the Lovable bot re-introduced it by
adding useMagazinePublish after the guard zone.
